_comment: Worker-pool tutorial example 1 of 3: PINNED to a specific worker.
name: wp_market_ingest
description: Market-data ingestion DAG, PINNED to Worker 0 so it always lands on the same process (useful when a feed library is not thread-safe or you want predictable placement). Publishes to an lmdb:// queue so a DAG on a DIFFERENT worker can read it.

worker_affinity._comment: Choose ONE placement style. Here we pin to a fixed worker.
